scripts.docker: op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- docker compose down && op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- docker compose up -d --build
scripts.docker:reset-db: op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- docker compose down && docker volume rm zerowp-eleming-cms_d1_data && op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- docker compose up -d --build
scripts.docker:trust-ca: op run --env-file=.env.tpl -- docker compose cp caddy:/data/caddy/pki/authorities/local/root.crt docker/caddy-root-ca.crt && sudo security add-trusted-cert -d -r trustRoot -k /Library/Keychains/System.keychain docker/caddy-root-ca.crt && echo 'Caddy root CA trusted'
